content.full_text:
June 17, 1976

The Honorable Gary E. Hansen  
Councilman, City of Santa Clara  
City Hall - 1500 Warburton Avenue  
Santa Clara, California

Dear Mr. Hansen:

Thank you for your letter of June 9, 1976, concerning the Conflict of Interest Code for the City of Santa Clara. The nature and scope of review which you urge with respect to proposed Sections 6 and 7 of the Code will be undertaken by the Conflicts of Interest Division of the Fair Political Practices Commission, and our conclusions with respect to these provisions will be transmitted to the Commission, along with your comments.

In view of the vast number of Codes which will require Commission scrutiny prior to the due date for the submission of the Code for the City of Santa Clara, it will be some time before there will be any formal communication between this Division and the City of Santa Clara regarding the Code. However, please be assured that we will scrutinize the Code with respect to matters of concern to you as set forth in your letter.

Sincerely,

Delbert L. Spurlock, Jr.  
Chief, Conflicts of Interest Division

DLS:glb
